steps.title: Separate independent clauses
steps.content: The words before the blank form one independent clause about the Hankasalmi observatory site. The words after the blank form another independent clause about Zhongshan Station in Antarctica.

steps.title: Use the semicolon
steps.content: A uses and without the comma needed to join independent clauses, B has no punctuation, and C creates a comma splice. A semicolon can correctly separate the two closely related independent clauses. The answer is D.
